## Goal

Connect the shared backend interface to one Transformer Linear layer.

## Files

`src/rns_llm/layers/`, `src/rns_llm/integration/`, `scripts/`

## Definition of done

- [ ] One Linear layer is identified/replaced.
- [ ] PyTorch fallback still works.
- [ ] Latency/PPL entry point is documented.
